title: What Computers Can Do
subtitle: Computers Performing Real-Life Tasks
overview: This session helps students understand how computers are used in real life for learning, communication, entertainment, calculations, design, automation and many other daily activities through pictures, videos and demonstrations.

images._note: Add photos/videos screenshots from classroom activities, computer labs, online learning, gaming, robots and real-life computer applications.

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Photo of online learning on computer
gallery.caption: Computers help students attend online classes
Computers are used for games and entertainment

gallery.caption: Hospitals use computers to manage patient records

gallery.caption: Banks use computers for transactions and ATM services

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Photo of robots controlled by computers
gallery.caption: Computers control robots and smart machines

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Photo of video editing software
gallery.caption: Computers help create videos, music and animations

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Photo of students using computers
gallery.caption: Students exploring different uses of computers

keyTopics: Computers help us learn and study
Computers can play music and videos
Computers are used in banks and ATMs
Computers help in communication and video calls
Computers help create drawings, animations and games
Real-life examples of computers around us

activity.title: Find Real-Life Uses of Computers
steps: Watch pictures/videos showing computers doing tasks
Identify where computers are being used
Separate uses into categories like education, banking, healthcare and entertainment
Draw one real-life use of a computer

options: An electronic machine that processes data
quiz.explanation: A computer is an electronic machine that works with information and instructions.

quiz.q: Which task can a computer do very fast?
quiz.explanation: Computers can solve calculations much faster than humans.

quiz.q: Where are computers used for online learning?
quiz.explanation: Students use computers at school and home for online classes.

quiz.q: Which place uses computers to store patient records?
quiz.explanation: Hospitals use computers to manage patient information.

quiz.q: Which machine uses computers for money transactions?
quiz.explanation: ATMs use computers to manage banking services.
Computers are used for entertainment like music and videos.

quiz.q: Which technology is controlled by computers?
quiz.explanation: Robots work using computer programs and instructions.
Computers help people connect through internet and video calls.

quiz.q: Which activity can computers help create?
quiz.explanation: Computers are used to create animations and graphics.

quiz.q: Where are computers used for online shopping?
quiz.explanation: Online shopping works using computers and internet systems.
Computers can safely store lots of information.

quiz.q: Which of these is a real-life use of computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers help scientists predict weather conditions.

quiz.q: Which device can students use to attend online classes?
quiz.explanation: Laptops and computers are used for online education.

quiz.q: What helps computers know what to do?
quiz.explanation: Computers follow programs and instructions given by humans.

quiz.q: Which field uses computers for controlling machines and robots?
quiz.explanation: Technology and robotics depend heavily on computers.
